description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a dark green and black color scheme. It is equipped with a prominent cylindrical pump grip beneath the barrel, and a large optical sight mounted on top, suggesting use in urban tactical scenarios. The receiver and stock are compact, with the stock ending abruptly, indicating a design optimized for maneuverability in tight spaces. The trigger guard is elongated and features a double-finger groove, providing enhanced grip and control. The barrel is single and relatively short, with ribbing visible on the pump for improved handling. Small decals or markings are present on the receiver, adding to its utilitarian appearance.
description: A tactical, green and black pump-action shotgun with a short barrel, optical sight, and ergonomic double-finger trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, optical sight, pump grip, and double-finger trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, sight alignment, and compact width.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the pump grip, receiver details, and stock profile.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the sight, stock end, and trigger guard alignment.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with ribbed pump grip beneath
